items.title: 'It's bizarre': Californians grapple with revelation that press gala gunman suspect was neighbour
items.dek: People living near the man charged with the attempted assassination of Trump say they were shocked to see their neighbour on TV.
items.body: People living near the man charged with the attempted assassination of Trump say they were shocked to see their neighbour on TV.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: BBC reports from scene of fatal Indonesia train crash
items.dek: At least 15 people have died after a train crashed into the female-only carriage of a commuter train in Bekasi.
items.body: At least 15 people have died after a train crashed into the female-only carriage of a commuter train in Bekasi.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kid Rock flies in Army helicopter weeks after flights near his house drew scrutiny
